scripts.db:seed: go -C apps/api-go run ./cmd/seed reference.sql && go -C apps/api-go run ./cmd/seed demo.sql
scripts.lint: go -C apps/api-go vet ./... && eslint apps/web/src apps/web/e2e apps/web/playwright.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: go -C apps/api-go test ./... -run=^$ && corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/web run typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run test:api && corepack pnpm run test:api:parity && corepack pnpm run test:api:differential && corepack pnpm run test:web
scripts.build: go -C apps/api-go build ./... && corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/web run build
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run build
